So in this post I’m going to assume I know already everything necessary for the bayesian analysis post i’m going to post here soon. It will include examples from both R and Python using rstan, rethinking and pymc3

Lets see \(\alpha + \beta = 5x\)

a list:

	import numpy as np

	def test_function(x,y):
		return np.sum(x,y)

or some inline code x+y = z
